RustDiscoveryState.description: State model derived from RustDiscovery TLA+ spec

MainIsTopLevel.message:
MainIsTopLevel violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "MAIN" =>
      ep.is_main = TRUE /\ ep.has_class = FALSE
MainIsTopLevel.description: Verifier for invariant MainIsTopLevel from RustDiscovery spec

MainNotImpl.message:
MainNotImpl violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "MAIN" => ep.has_class = FALSE
MainNotImpl.description: Verifier for invariant MainNotImpl from RustDiscovery spec

PublicOnlyForLibrary.message:
PublicOnlyForLibrary violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "PUBLIC_API" => codebase_type = "library"
PublicOnlyForLibrary.description: Verifier for invariant PublicOnlyForLibrary from RustDiscovery spec

ImplMethodsExcluded.message:
ImplMethodsExcluded violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "PUBLIC_API" => ep.has_class = FALSE
ImplMethodsExcluded.description: Verifier for invariant ImplMethodsExcluded from RustDiscovery spec

DotfilesExcluded.message: DotfilesExcluded violation: \A ep \in entry_points : ep.is_dotfile = FALSE
DotfilesExcluded.description: Verifier for invariant DotfilesExcluded from RustDiscovery spec

HttpRouteHasMethod.message:
HttpRouteHasMethod violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "HTTP_ROUTE" =>
      ep.method \in {"GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH",...
HttpRouteHasMethod.description: Verifier for invariant HttpRouteHasMethod from RustDiscovery spec

ValidEntryTypes.description: Verifier for invariant ValidEntryTypes from RustDiscovery spec

NoMainFromImpl.message:
NoMainFromImpl violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.has_class = TRUE => ep.etype /= "MAIN"
NoMainFromImpl.description: Verifier for invariant NoMainFromImpl from RustDiscovery spec

NoPublicAPIFromImpl.message:
NoPublicAPIFromImpl violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.has_class = TRUE => ep.etype /= "PUBLIC_API"
NoPublicAPIFromImpl.description: Verifier for invariant NoPublicAPIFromImpl from RustDiscovery spec

AllInvariants.message:
AllInvariants violation: /\ MainIsTopLevel
  /\ MainNotImpl
  /\ PublicOnlyForLibrary
  /\ ImplMethodsExcluded
  /\ DotfilesExcluded
  /\ Http...
AllInvariants.description: Verifier for invariant AllInvariants from RustDiscovery spec

assert_MainIsTopLevel.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "MAIN" implies
      ep.is_main = TRUE and ep.has_class = FALSE
assert_MainIsTopLevel.message:
Assertion failed: MainIsTopLevel — \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "MAIN" =>
      ep.is_main = TRUE /\ ep.has_class = FALSE
assert_MainIsTopLevel.description: Test assertion for MainIsTopLevel from RustDiscovery spec

assert_MainNotImpl.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "MAIN" implies ep.has_class = FALSE
assert_MainNotImpl.message:
Assertion failed: MainNotImpl — \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "MAIN" => ep.has_class = FALSE
assert_MainNotImpl.description: Test assertion for MainNotImpl from RustDiscovery spec

assert_PublicOnlyForLibrary.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
    ep.etype = "PUBLIC_API" implies codebase_type = "library"

assert_HttpRouteHasMethod.message:
Assertion failed: HttpRouteHasMethod — \A ep \in entry_points :

assert_ValidEntryTypes.message:
Assertion failed: ValidEntryTypes — \A ep \in entry_points :
    ep.etype \in {"MAIN", "PUBLIC_API", "HTTP_ROUTE", "CLI_COMMAND"}
assert_ValidEntryTypes.description: Test assertion for ValidEntryTypes from RustDiscovery spec

assert_NoMainFromImpl.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
    ep.has_class = TRUE implies ep.etype /= "MAIN"

Assertion failed: NoMainFromImpl — \A ep \in entry_points :

Assertion failed: NoPublicAPIFromImpl — \A ep \in entry_points :

assert_AllInvariants.condition:
and MainIsTopLevel
  and MainNotImpl
  and PublicOnlyForLibrary
  and ImplMethodsExcluded
  and DotfilesExcluded
  and HttpRouteHasMethod
  and ValidEntryTypes
  and NoMainFromImpl
  and NoPublicAPIFromImpl
